meaning: adj.不健康的,对健康有害的
examples: His eyeballs were an unhealthy yellow.
His skin had an unhealthy greyish tinge.
An unhealthy diet will nullify the effects of training.
But he pointed out that statins would not affect all the negative effects of an unhealthy diet.
Like its neighbours, Thailand suffers from an unhealthy combination of patronage and opaque business activities.
